scores.correctness_notes: All required sections present and correct: services with override/command/startup/environment/on-check-failure, checks with http/period/timeout/threshold/level, log-targets with type/location/services/labels. Matches gold standard structure well.
scores.hallucination_notes: on-success and on-failure fields in services section are not standard Pebble layer spec fields — Pebble uses on-check-failure but not on-success/on-failure as top-level service restart policies in this form. Also description field at layer level is not in the gold standard spec.
